name: CORE MOLDING TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: Core Molding Technologies, Inc. operates as a molder of thermoplastic and thermoset structural products, producing molded products for medium and heavy-duty trucks, power sports, building products, and other industrial markets.

exposures.sentence: We may use artificial intelligence in our business and operations, and challenges with effectively managing its use could harm our business and expose us to costly liability.
Cybersecurity incidents may threaten our confidential information, disrupt operations and result in harm to our reputation and adversely impact our business and financial performance.

catalysts.event: Shipped entire backlog of $16.8 million in first month of 2026
catalysts.sentence: The ordered backlog of four weeks of expected shipments was approximately $16.8 million, 100% of which the Company shipped during the first month of 2026.
